case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS VANSLAMBROUCK,CHARLES M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,663.39 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT VANSLAMBROUCK,CHARLES M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VANSLAMBROUCK,CHARLES M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANSLAMBROUCK,CHARLES M. $1,663.39 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,705.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VANSLAMBROUCK,CHARLES M.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $39.25 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT VANSLAMBROUCK,CHARLES M.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT VANSLAMBROUCK,CHARLES M.
